Class: EvSmartRoutingRequest

bemap.EvSmartRoutingRequest(optionsopt)

new EvSmartRoutingRequest(optionsopt)

BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - EvSmartRoutingRequest (v1.5) Strongly-typed request builder for `POST service/evsmartrouting/1.0`. Wire shape cross-checked against the BeMap server contract in `bemap_idea/.../service/v1_0_0/model/evSmartRouting/request/EvSmartRoutingRequest.java`. The server requires: - `startLon`, `startLat`, `stopLon`, `stopLat` (decimal degrees, WGS84) - `vehicle` — a vehicle key from the user's allowed EV brand catalogue - At least one entry in `chargingStationProviders` (`csps` on the wire) Example: var req = new bemap.EvSmartRoutingRequest({ start: new bemap.Coordinate(2.35, 48.85), stop: new bemap.Coordinate(4.83, 45.75), vehicle: 'renault-megane-e-tech-ev60', chargingStationProviders: ['ecoMovement'], initBatteryLevel: 80, minBatteryLevel: 10, minArrivalBatteryLevel: 20, temperature: 18 });
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
options Object <optional>
Properties
Name Type Attributes Default Description
start bemap.Coordinate | Object Departure coordinate (decimal degrees, WGS84).
stop bemap.Coordinate | Object Arrival coordinate (decimal degrees, WGS84).
vias Array.<(bemap.Coordinate|{lon:Number, lat:Number})> <optional>
 Intermediate waypoints, in order.
vehicle String Vehicle key (UUID-like, from the EV catalogue).
chargingStationProviders Array.<String> Allowed CSP keys (e.g. `'ecoMovement'`). Maps to the `csps` field.
chargingStationFilters Array.<String> <optional>
 Filter expressions — see BeMap docs. Maps to `csfs`.
chargingStationDeprecatedConnector Boolean <optional>
 false Allow stops on stations with deprecated connector types.
initBatteryLevel Number <optional>
 100 Initial battery level (0-100).
minBatteryLevel Number <optional>
 0 Minimum battery level allowed during the journey (0-100).
minArrivalBatteryLevel Number <optional>
 0 Minimum battery level required at destination (0-100).
maxAfterChargeBatteryLevel Number <optional>
 Maximum battery level after a stop (50-100). Vehicle default ≈ 90.
weather Boolean <optional>
 false Include real-time weather impact in the energy calculation.
weatherProvider String <optional>
 Optional explicit weather provider key.
temperature Number <optional>
 20 Ambient temperature, °C.
departureTime String | Date | Number <optional>
 Epoch ms, ISO string, or Date — when the trip starts.
stepPointPluggingTime Number <optional>
 0 Extra time (in seconds) for each charging stop (plugging delay).
payload Number <optional>
 75 Extra weight in kg.
criterias Array.<String> <optional>
 EV-specific criteria — e.g. `AVOID_MOTORWAYS`, `AVOID_TOLLS`.
optimMode String <optional>
 Optimisation mode, e.g. `FASTEST`.
connectorTypes Array.<Number> <optional>
 Filter on these connector IDs.
restrictedEvse Boolean <optional>
 false Allow private / employees-only stations.
polyline Boolean <optional>
 true Include the route polyline.
encodedPolyline Boolean <optional>
 false Include the Google-encoded polyline.
events Boolean <optional>
 false Include route timeline events.
eventFrequency Number <optional>
 60 Event sampling, seconds (`evtFreq`).
alternative Number <optional>
 0 Alternative-route index (0..2) (`alr`).
currency String <optional>
 ISO 4217 currency for cost calc.
drivingStyle String <optional>
 Driving style enum.
allowNaStatus Boolean <optional>
 false Allow stops on charging stations with unknown availability (`allowNaStatus`).
allowMaxSpeedReco Boolean <optional>
 false Recommend max speed between step points (`allowMaxSpdReco`).
co2Emissions Boolean <optional>
 false Include saved CO2 estimation in the journey summary.
debugStat Boolean <optional>
 false Server-debug flag, leave false in prod.
arrivalTime String | Date | Number <optional>
 Arrive-by time (epoch ms / Date / ISO) — alternative to departureTime.
extraPayload Number <optional>
 Extra payload weight (kg) on top of `payload`.
stepPointTimeSlots Array.<Object> <optional>
 Per-step charge time-slot windows (forced charges take priority).
aroundEvse Boolean <optional>
 false Include charging stations around step points in the response.
ignoreStatus Boolean <optional>
 false Ignore charging-station availability status.
evtExtKey String <optional>
 Extended route-timeline key (requires events:true).
geoserver String <optional>
 Override the Context geoserver.
Since:
  • 1.5.0
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/ev-routing/bemap-ev-smart-routing-request.js, line 91

Methods

toJson() → {Object}

Build the wire-format JSON body. Drops null / default fields so the payload stays minimal.
Source:
  • bemap-services-v2/ev-routing/bemap-ev-smart-routing-request.js, line 172
Returns:
Type
Object
